articles.headline: NVIDIA launches the Nemotron Coalition at GTC 2026
articles.summary: NVIDIA announced the Nemotron Coalition at GTC 2026 to advance AI model development. The initiative focuses on collaborative efforts in AI capabilities. This launch highlights NVIDIA's push in chips and hardware for AI infrastructure.

articles.headline: OpenAI plans to almost double its headcount this year
articles.summary: OpenAI plans to increase its staff from about 4,500 to 8,000 by the end of 2026 to compete with Anthropic and Google. The new hires will focus on product development, engineering, research, and sales. The company has expanded its San Francisco office space to over 1 million square feet to accommodate growth.

articles.headline: Elon Musk says xAI will match OpenAI, Google and Anthropic by 2026
articles.summary: Elon Musk outlined an ambitious roadmap for xAI, predicting it will match leading AI labs like OpenAI, Google, and Anthropic by the end of 2026. He foresees xAI pulling far ahead within three years, requiring a metaphorical James Webb Telescope to spot competitors. The company is focusing on hiring, infrastructure, and coordination with SpaceX amid intensifying AI competition.
